name: Crab Delights Nachos
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon canned green chilies, chopped and drained
1/4 pound shredded Monterey Jack cheese, or thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread a single layer of tortilla chips on a pizza pan or cookie sheet.
2. Cut the Crab Delights legs into 1/2 inch pieces and place one piece on top of each tortilla chip.
3. Sprinkle with the green onions and chopped green chilies.
4. Cover evenly with cheese.
5. Broil until the cheese is melted. (If using a glass pizza pan, place in the microwave oven for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes on high to melt the cheese.)
